markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar's confirmation of Grand Theft Auto VI's November 19, 2026 release after two delays has extended the window through fall, positioning the market to weigh cultural, tech, and geopolitical milestones most likely to occur first. Traders focus on streaming giants like GPT-6 launches, major album drops from artists such as Playboi Carti or Rihanna, U.S. political shifts post-presidency, and international developments including potential ceasefires or conflicts, all amplified by the game's massive cultural footprint that often reshapes release schedules industry-wide. Take-Two's earnings updates and Rockstar's polish commitments remain key swing factors, with historical patterns showing how extended timelines heighten uncertainty around unpredictable entertainment and news cycles.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent mistrial in Harvey Weinstein’s third New York retrial on the Jessica Mann rape charge has reinforced trader consensus favoring no additional prison time. Repeated hung juries on the lower-level felony, which carries a maximum of four years and could run concurrently with his existing 16-year California sentence, have diminished prospects for further incarceration. Weinstein, already serving time at Rikers amid documented health issues, faces a June deadline for prosecutors to pursue a fourth trial, yet procedural setbacks and appeals momentum continue to shape the outlook. The 80% implied probability reflects this pattern of legal attrition rather than guaranteed resolution.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vegas Golden Knights and Carolina Hurricanes advanced as the 2025-26 Western and Eastern Conference champions to contest the Stanley Cup Final, with trader consensus reflecting Vegas’s current series edge after a 2-1 lead. The Golden Knights secured the Pacific Division title and advanced by sweeping the Avalanche in the conference finals, capitalizing on strong goaltending and depth scoring in a lower-scoring regular season. Carolina posted the league’s best record at 113 points but faces the challenge of overcoming a resilient Vegas squad that has won two of three games, including a double-overtime victory in Game 3 following the Hurricanes’ record three-goal rally in 39 seconds. Recent form, home-ice factors in the series, and historical playoff execution position Vegas as the slight favorite while Carolina retains realistic comeback potential in a best-of-seven format.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: The New York Knicks' 2-0 lead in the NBA Finals has shifted trader consensus sharply in their favor, reflecting strong recent momentum and a favorable matchup against the San Antonio Spurs. New York's depth, led by Jalen Brunson and Karl-Anthony Towns, combined with elite perimeter defense from OG Anunoby and Mikal Bridges, has produced efficient offense and stingy defense through the playoffs. The Spurs, despite a strong 62-20 regular season and Victor Wembanyama's MVP-caliber impact, have faced challenges sustaining that form in the series. These developments explain the current implied probabilities, with the Knicks holding a substantial edge heading into Game 3.

This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spain and France lead the 2026 World Cup winner market at equal implied probabilities due to their deep squads, recent European success, and strong qualifying campaigns featuring talents like Lamine Yamal. England sits close behind on the strength of back-to-back major tournament final appearances and consistent depth across positions. Portugal, Argentina, and Brazil follow as established contenders with proven knockout pedigree, while Germany and the Netherlands remain competitive despite recent inconsistencies. With the expanded 48-team field and tournament kickoff days away, minor squad adjustments from injuries and final tune-up results continue to shape the tight hierarchy among these sides.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping's consolidated authority over the Chinese Communist Party, military, and state institutions underpins the 93% trader consensus against his removal before 2027. Recent public appearances, including a May 2026 summit with U.S. President Trump in Beijing and March directives on military loyalty and defense modernization, signal uninterrupted leadership. Ongoing purges of senior generals, such as those announced in January 2026, have been viewed as efforts to enforce central control rather than signs of vulnerability. With no verified internal challenges, health issues, or elite realignments reported in 2026, and expectations that Xi will pursue a further term at the 21st Party Congress in 2027, the market reflects the absence of conditions that would trigger an early transition.
